name: HCRG Care Group
message: HCRG Care Group (founded in 2006) is a healthcare company that provides healthcare services such as physician clinics and specialty clinics. HCRG Care corporate office is located in The Heath Business and Technical Park, Runcorn, Cheshire, WA7 4QX, United Kingdom and has 5,000 employees.
